SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT (the "SPA") is made and entered into as of 15th October 2023, by and among:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No. S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, and reachable at +65 9123 4567 or drtanwei@example.sg.

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No. S3456789C), residing at 456 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 259888.

3. Muthu Holdings Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456A), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 789 Shenton Way, Singapore 079120.

WHEREAS, the Purchaser desires to purchase from the Seller, and the Seller desires to sell to the Purchaser, 100,000 shares of Muthu Holdings Pte Ltd for a total consideration of SGD 1,500,000, upon the terms and conditions set forth in this SPA.

WHEREAS, the parties acknowledge that the project status reports shall not be used as a basis for any claim under this SPA.

For the purposes of this Agreement, references to the SPA shall mean this Share Purchase Agreement and its terms.

Please access the document using the secure link: https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.
